    specifying-manual-cut-scores

    specifying-manual-cut-scores.Rmd

    Specification of Manual Cut Scores

    Overview

    How to specify manual cuts

    Fit Embeded Standard Setting 

    library(EmStanS)
    set.seed(100)
# data <- read.csv(filePath)
fake_data <- genFakeDataSet(ngca = 3, 
               cor_val = 0.2,
               n = 30,
               nlevel = 3,
               ntable = 5,
               npanelist = 5,
               sdinp = 1,
               ecinp = 0,
               100,300)



fake_data
#> $setup
#> # A tibble: 3 × 7
#>   GCA   `Content Area` `Grade Group` `Number of Tables per Room` `Level Options`
#>   <chr> <chr>          <chr>         <chr>                       <chr>          
#> 1 M1    Math           1             5                           Level1, Level2…
#> 2 M2    Math           2             5                           Level1, Level2…
#> 3 M3    Math           3             5                           Level1, Level2…
#> # ℹ 2 more variables: SD <dbl>, EC <dbl>
#> 
#> $panelist
#> # A tibble: 75 × 3
#>   GCA   Panelist Table
#>   <chr> <chr>    <chr>
#> 1 M1    M1.T1.1  T1   
#> 2 M1    M1.T1.2  T1   
#> 3 M1    M1.T1.3  T1   
#> 4 M1    M1.T1.4  T1   
#> 5 M1    M1.T1.5  T1   
#> # ℹ 70 more rows
#> 
#> $rating
#> # A tibble: 2,250 × 8
#>   GCA   Subject Grade Round Table Panelist Item_ID ALD   
#>   <chr> <chr>   <chr> <dbl> <chr> <chr>    <chr>   <chr> 
#> 1 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_1    Level1
#> 2 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_2    Level1
#> 3 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_3    Level2
#> 4 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_4    Level3
#> 5 M1    Math    1         1 T1    M1.T1.1  M1_5    Level2
#> # ℹ 2,245 more rows
#> 
#> $item_data
#> # A tibble: 90 × 7
#>   GCA   Domain Item_ID Total_points Point Order_of_Difficulty Loc_RP50
#>   <chr> <chr>  <chr>          <dbl> <dbl>               <int>    <dbl>
#> 1 M1    Alg    M1_1               1     1                   1     111.
#> 2 M1    Alg    M1_2               1     1                   2     134.
#> 3 M1    Prob   M1_3               1     1                   3     134.
#> 4 M1    Alg    M1_4               1     1                   4     141.
#> 5 M1    Geom   M1_5               1     1                   5     152.
#> # ℹ 85 more rows
#> 
#> $examineedata_data
#> # A tibble: 615 × 3
#>   score  freq Grade
#>   <int> <int> <chr>
#> 1   100     6 M1   
#> 2   101     5 M1   
#> 3   102     2 M1   
#> 4   103     6 M1   
#> 5   104     8 M1   
#> # ℹ 610 more rows

# Or you can use your own data structured by the following table.
    res <- emstans(data = fake_data,
               grade = c(1,2),
               targets = "ALD",
               WESS = T,
               gamest = F,
               median = "modal",
               loc = "Loc_RP50",
               domain = "GCA")

    Update with manual cut scores 

    extract(res, "cutscore")
#> $`M1-All`
#>   2_W   3_W 
#> 134.3 276.4 
#> 
#> $`M2-All`
#>   2_W   3_W 
#> 189.5 330.0
    new_res <- update(res, "M1-All" = c(150, 200))

    Report 

    report(new_res, what = "all")

    GCA . Level1 Level2 Level3
    M1-All OIB Page 1-4 5-15 16-30
    Cut Scores 150 200
    Percent in Level 26.9% 26.1% 47%
    Percent at or Above Level 100% 73.1% 47%
    Percent Below Level 26.9% 53%
    M2-All OIB Page 1-5 6-28 29-30
    Cut Scores 189.5 330
    Percent in Level 20.1% 69.1% 10.8%
    Percent at or Above Level 100% 79.9% 10.8%
    Percent Below Level 20.1% 89.2%
